source_intake_record.raw_question_text: A mixing chamber receives 5 kg/min ammonia as saturated liquid at−20\circ\text{C} from one line and ammonia at 40\circ\text{C}, 250 kPa from another line through a valve. The chamber also receives 325 kJ/min energy as heat transferred from a reservoir. This should produce saturated ammonia vapor at−20\circ\text{C} in the exit line. What is the total entropy generation in the process?
